channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Writer Ian Bogost says ‘The Small Stuff’ can help us reclaim our lives from dematerialization
item.description: Has Silicon Valley been building the wrong things?

item.title: Australia doubles the maximum penalty for its social media ban
item.description: The fine can now potentially hit 99 million AUD, or $68 million.

item.title: Mercy on Prime Video is a huge AI flop — but Chris Pratt's double bill recommendation is the underrated Christopher Nolan movie you need to stream ASAP
item.description: Even though I don't think Mercy is one of the worst movies of 2026, it's bad enough to only stream Chris Pratt's epic double-bill recommendation on its own.

item.title: 5 iPhone apps I can't live without — from StoryGraph to Google Photos
item.description: Of all the apps available on iOS, these are five of my very favorite, and I use most of them every day.

item.title: The Cube is Jim Henson’s little-known proto-Black Mirror masterpiece
item.description: I'm sure we're all familiar with Dark Crystal, so we know that Jim Henson can be weird and tackle slightly more mature subject matter. But there is little in his oeuvre that is quite as mind-bending as the Muppetless The Cube. This 1969 teleplay was produced for an NBC anthology series called Experiment in Television, […]

item.title: Apple's touchscreen MacBook reportedly won't wait for the M7 chips
item.description: The new models will launch with the M5 Pro and M5 Max, according to Mark Gurman.

item.title: Watch out — that income tax form could actually be dangerous malware
item.description: Researchers uncovered a fake tax notice campaign that delivered remote-access malware via staged downloads and encrypted communications.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: All eyes on Tesla FSD
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: How to watch South Africa vs Canada: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts start knockout phase
item.description: Here's how to watch South Africa vs Canada for free online and from anywhere as the World Cup 2026 co-hosts kick-off the knockout stage, against Bafana Bafana.

item.title: Honor 600 vs Samsung Galaxy A57 : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone milieu de gamme ?
item.description: Les Galaxy A de Samsung sont les maîtres absolus sur le milieu de gamme. En tout cas, ce sont ceux qui se vendent le mieux. Pourtant, n'y a-t-il pas possibilité de s'offrir mieux, pour le même prix ? Le Honor 600 se présente comme un challenger compétent !

item.title: Mesh Wi-Fi or a range extender? Here's how to know which one you actually need
item.description: Wi-Fi extenders are cheap, but come with distinct drawbacks.
